text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I heard a rumor that there's a ghost 
in our dorm!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it's friendly? Do you think 
it has a favorite snack?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Do ghosts prefer cold things like ice cream?
Or would carrot cake be better?
